headline: Sennheiser’s new Momentum 5 headphones have upgraded ANC and a replaceable battery
summary: Sennheiser introduces its Momentum 5 Wireless headphones. They feature upgraded Active Noise Cancellation for superior sound. A new replaceable battery design enhances longevity and user convenience.

headline: Ferrari reveals its first EV, with design help from Jony Ive
summary: Ferrari unveils its first electric vehicle, named Luce. The EV was designed in collaboration with Jony Ive and LoveFrom. It is also Ferrari's second four-door model and first EV.

headline: Cox Media fined after bragging it spied on users through their phones
summary: Cox Media and marketing firms face FTC fines for deceptive practices. They falsely claimed to secretly listen to users via smart devices. The companies will pay a settlement for misleading advertising.

headline: The best Memorial Day sales you can shop this weekend
summary: Memorial Day sales are now in full swing, offering significant discounts. Find great deals on tech gadgets like portable speakers and smart lights. It's an ideal time to upgrade your gear with seasonal savings.

headline: Tekken Director Katsuhiro Harada Finally Takes a Trip to Waffle House
summary: Tekken director Katsuhiro Harada finally visited Waffle House. This visit fulfills a long-standing fan request. The gaming icon's trip became a social media highlight.

headline: LittleBigPlanet Developer Media Molecule's Next Game Reportedly Features 'Open-World Content'
summary: Media Molecule, the studio behind LittleBigPlanet, is developing a new game. Reports suggest their upcoming title will incorporate open-world elements. This marks a potential new creative direction for the developer.

headline: Save $950 Off the Massively Powerful Lenovo Legion Pro 7 RTX 5090 Gaming Laptop for Memorial Day
summary: Get $950 off the Lenovo Legion Pro 7 RTX 5090 gaming laptop. It features a stunning 16-inch, 2500x1600, 240Hz OLED display. This Memorial Day deal also includes a copy of 007: First Light.

headline: Save 25% Off the Steelseries Arctis Nova 7 Gen 2 Wireless Gaming Headset for Memorial Day
summary: The Steelseries Arctis Nova 7 Gen 2 wireless gaming headset is 25% off. This Memorial Day promotion offers the new lowest price. Grab this deal to upgrade your gaming audio setup.

headline: Former SNP chief executive Peter Murrell in custody after admitting £400,000 embezzlement
summary: Peter Murrell, former SNP chief executive, is remanded in custody. He admitted to embezzling £400,000. Murrell is the estranged husband of former First Minister Nicola Sturgeon.

headline: The questions raised by the Murrell embezzlement controversy
summary: The Murrell embezzlement case has cast a long shadow over the SNP. The police investigation has been ongoing for five years. The controversy continues to raise significant political questions.

headline: Hottest May day on record in UK as temperatures pass 34C
summary: The UK experienced its hottest May day ever, with temperatures exceeding 34C. This follows the warmest May night on record, reaching 19.4C. The extreme weather marks a significant climate event.

headline: Woman dies after being shot outside Sheffield bar
summary: A 30-year-old woman has died after being shot in Sheffield. The incident occurred outside a bar early Monday morning. Three people have been taken into custody in connection with the shooting.
